texto: All I want in life is to pet my dog and cat. After that, all I want to do is post photos of them. Mostly because they're the cutest things ever, but also because I don't have to worry about how ugly I look in the photo.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Cazzie David sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “All I want in life is to pet my dog and cat. After that, all I want to do is post photos of them.…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, dog, worry, útil em momentos de dog e worry.
